{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201739120F649FC22BA3496B002D"}"},"total":1497},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7322473794025587519","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的特别好看，都是童年回忆啊。虽然有些偏向于后宫流，但是并没有让我觉得乱，条理非常清晰。找遍全番茄可能也找不到这样写童年回忆的书了，希望作者永不完结，钱不够了就发个章末，只求不要太监烂尾完结。作者加油，么么哒[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704896907,"group_id":"7280082695135169575","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"优菈，神子，云堇，芙芙，黄泉，仇白，深靛，嘿嘿嘿…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzrbN/5gANMX9TrDwNFxR15YKRsbALrFOueJLZNy/Yqi","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c99a268fc6684f61b2cc0e2065cd54ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530523&x-signature=GIjVBZl8vRmkTEk5JojjYIy42A0%3D","user_id":"4013685797567943","user_name":"摘星崖剑神"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4013685797567943","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7280082695135169575","book_info":{"abstract":"【童年回忆+童年动画片+无敌+轻松】
叶天获得无限穿越系统，开局穿越到神奇阿呦的世界。
并且解锁打卡功能，可以通过前往宇宙当中的其他星球进行打卡获得奖励。
【打卡成功，恭喜宿主获得「无限续航版竹蜻蜓*12」】
【打卡成功，恭喜宿主获得「升级版超能训练盒」】
【打卡成功，恭喜宿主获得「任意版壁纸屋」】
……
ps：不是黑暗童年，虽然一些童年女神会是女主，但是不会特别离谱，不算毁童年。
【已选世界（以去）】：神奇阿呦-电击小子-神兵小将-甜心格格-超兽武装-侠岚-功夫熊猫-巴啦啦小魔仙-星际精灵蓝多多-美猴王-熊出没
【备选世界（画饼）】：喜羊羊与灰太狼-十二生肖系列-哪吒传奇-美猴王-天上掉下个猪八戒-成龙历险记-洛洛历险记-果宝特攻-骑刃王-宇宙星神-甜心格格-侠岚-铠甲勇士-巴啦啦小魔仙-星际精灵蓝多多-外星小子哆布哆-火力少年王-神魄-泰拉星环-虹猫蓝兔系列-蓝猫龙骑团-恐龙宝贝-果果骑侠传-锋速战警-纳米神兵-功夫熊猫……陆续补充中。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5632e54fe49c084ce5c39fcd3c3003e0","author":"茗泽","author_id":"","book_id":"7280082695135169575","book_name":"从神奇阿呦开始为所欲为","book_short_name":"童年动画世界","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#788090","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7280082740530119207","read_count":"16060","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1002332"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","seri 作者还精心配制图片，真的是看一眼就瞬间回忆起来了，看得出作者没少翻剧情、抓细节，为作者的真心奉上五星[学会了][学会了][学会了]","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":10,"text":"神兵小将","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%A5%9E%E5%85%B5%E5%B0%8F%E5%B0%86&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773999552496B002D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227328412494116160318%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227280082695135169575%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%A5%9E%E5%85%B5%E5%B0%8F%E5%B0%86%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706280385,"group_id":"7280082695135169575","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"祝大家天天开心！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+yVUy1mvt/FvGPsCqNgnUn0TdhYuLR6B0KAmXAjrF12","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cdd46bdbd6fc4468979a7c45b5cca2c6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529956&x-signature=e%2BT9VRySJxEjIH74KFBgJxhzKWA%3D","user_id":"1289074121376782","user_name":"阅之南"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1289074121376782","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7280082695135169575","book_info":{"abstract":"【童年回忆+童
